evals.prompt: Write test scenarios for the feature implemented in the git worktree at c:\dev\main\frontend\.worktrees\feature-auto-fill-vat-isatcode-from-registry
evals.expected_output: Gherkin scenarios covering: auto-fill of VAT and ISAT code when national registry lookup finds a company, new vs existing customer/supplier/employee distinction (IsActive auto-set only for new records), individual vs company type branching, delisted company handling, and relevant error/empty states. Should combine related field assertions in single scenarios rather than one scenario per field.
